projects.name: AI-Powered Chatbot Builder
projects.description: A comprehensive no-code platform enabling businesses to design, prototype, and deploy custom Generative AI agents. Features document ingestion via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), vector database search, and conversational memory configurations.
features: Dynamic Document Ingestion (PDF, TXT, DOCX) with automated chunking
Vector Embeddings Generation & querying with high semantic match
Configurable system instructions and temperature selectors per agent
Real-time streaming conversation rendering with streaming UI cards
Exportable chatbot widget script for direct website installation

projects.name: MERN SaaS E-commerce Application
projects.description: A premium, fully featured single-page e-commerce solution offering secure checkout, dynamic stock monitoring, complex product filtering pipelines, and an intensive administrator operations dashboard.
features: Secure payment simulation gateway with dynamic discount codes
Intuitive admin interface for product inventory, category controls, and order dispatch tracking
Complex client-side product searching, tag-filtering, and dynamic pagination
Interactive customer cart management, wishlist persistence, and purchase notifications
Rich charts displaying sales metrics and product category breakdown logs

projects.name: AI Resume Optimization Engine
projects.description: An interactive smart system that processes PDF resumes, evaluates them against specific job listings, provides metric-driven matching reports, and generates customized revision suggestions.
features: Robust client-side PDF document parser and text extractor
Automated semantic core-skills profiling against job role descriptions
Intelligent ATS scoring (Applicant Tracking System compatibility check)
Prompt engineering architecture for highly tailored structure and action-verb improvements
Downloadable side-by-side comparison analytics and tailored cover letters

projects.name: Dynamic AI Interview Prep Coach
projects.description: A highly specialized conversational training platform that simulates technical job interviews, evaluates user answers with contextual AI feedback, and records overall scoring progress.
features: Real-time dynamic voice or text-based continuous conversation scenarios
Highly adaptive difficulty pacing based on prompt candidate feedback
Instant conceptual grading, missing skill notifications, and model answers
Dashboard metrics tracing confidence growth, pace, and knowledge completeness
Preconfigured interview sets representing top Tier-1 tech company roles

education.description: Majored in Advanced Computing systems. Spearheaded multiple projects focusing on full-stack web automation, natural language processing models, and serverless architectures.
Built strong foundations in data structures, algorithms, object-oriented concepts, relational database normalization, and operating system mechanisms.
Focused on core sciences: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Computer Science.
Graduated with absolute distinction in general sciences and creative writing courses.

experience.description: Designed and deployed custom automated agents utilizing client-side RAG pipelines with the modern @google/genai Node SDK. Optimized context mapping algorithms that reduced token usage on extensive chat loads. Constructed microservices executing asynchronous web socket channels and state-driven conversation components.

Coordinated development of key dynamic features on several enterprise-grade SaaS models. Engineered complex data schema validation filters, password encryption middleware, and dynamic multi-user session management workflows. Boosted layout rendering speeds by transitioning heavy sections to pure CSS utility classes and modularized state systems.

messages.name: Sarah Jenkins
messages.subject: Collaboration Opportunity - AI Chat Widget Integration
messages.message: Hi there! I came across your portfolio and I am extremely impressed by your Generative AI integrations, especially the Chatbot Platform. We have a client looking to build a tailored RAG chatbot on their website and we'd love to contract you for this project. Let me know when you are open for a brief introductory call!
